description.value:
Isolated research communities dot Jenikar's jungles, populated by botanists, zoologists, and biologists. Those who live in the depths of the sodden rain forests contend daily with camouflaging ambush predators, hypnotic carnivorous plants, and swarms of telepathic amphibious rodents. Osharus from the jungle are lanky and lean, with adhesive secretions and clinging cilia that make them natural climbers.

You become trained in Athletics. If you would automatically become trained in Athletics (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in another skill of your choice. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Climbing Specialist] (25 feet) feat.
